evidence: Reviewed current uncommitted F-0029 implementation after final retry/idempotency fixes, with focus on active/stale sending duplicate sends, timeout retry, replay text mismatch, and Telegram egress state-machine regressions.

apps/core/src/actions/tool-gateway.ts sends durable outbox text from sending.textJson and records telegram_api_timeout as terminal failure.
